creator: duffner@fh-konstanz.de
text:
during make install of qmail, I get:
merkur# make install
===>  Installing for qmail-1.03
/usr/libexec/elf/strip: /var/qmail/configure/config-fast: File format not recognized
*** Error code 70

Stop.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
merkur#

How-To-Repeat: it's always repeatable ...
